meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Sony Xperia repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Sony Xperia Repair Winnipeg | Screen & Camera Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Sony Xperia repair in Winnipeg. Screen, battery, camera repair for Xperia 1, 5, 10 series & Pro models. Premium device specialists.
page.h1: Sony Xperia Phone Repair in Winnipeg, MB
page.heroDescription: Own a Sony Xperia? We understand these premium devices with their 4K displays and pro-grade cameras. Expert repairs for all Xperia models in Winnipeg.

heroImage.alt: Sony Xperia repair services in Winnipeg

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: 4K OLED and HDR display replacements for Xperia 1, 5, and 10 series.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore full-day battery life. Same-day replacement for most models.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: USB-C charging port diagnosis and repair.

services.name: Camera Repair
services.description: Sony Alpha-engineered camera repairs. ZEISS optics and pro-grade sensors.

services.name: Water Damage Repair
services.description: IP68-rated Xperia water damage diagnosis and repair.

advantage_pillars.title: Xperia Specialists in Winnipeg
advantage_pillars.description: One of the few shops servicing Sony Xperia devices.

advantage_pillars.title: Parts We Can Source
advantage_pillars.description: We maintain supplier relationships for Xperia parts.

advantage_pillars.title: Pro Camera Experts
advantage_pillars.description: We service Sony Alpha-derived camera systems and ZEISS optics.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty.

models_description: We repair all Sony Xperia devices including the flagship 1 series, compact 5 series, and mid-range 10 series.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Sony Xperia repair costs depend heavily on the model—4K OLED displays are premium components. Sony's official Xperia support page provides battery care guidance.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that Xperia flagship repairs can cost as much as iPhone or Samsung repairs. iFixit's Xperia teardowns illustrate the engineering complexity.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost approaches your Xperia's current value, we'll explain that clearly.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair doesn't make sense, data recovery is often still possible.

faqs.question: Do you repair Sony Xperia phones in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're one of the few repair shops in Winnipeg that specializes in Sony Xperia devices.

faqs.question: Are Sony Xperia parts available in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: We maintain supplier relationships for Xperia parts. Most available within 3-5 days.

faqs.question: Can you replace 4K Xperia screens?
faqs.answer: Yes, we replace the high-resolution 4K OLED displays on Xperia 1 series.

faqs.question: How long does Xperia screen repair take in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Most are completed same-day once parts are available, typically within 1-2 hours.

faqs.question: Is Xperia repair worth it?
faqs.answer: Xperia phones are premium devices with unique features. Repair is often worthwhile.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
